plan. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRIOR_AUTHORIZATION_YN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

 VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: Part D plan sponsors submit the pricing, tiers, and formularies for their plan benefit packages to CMS 
via the Health Plan Management System (HPMS). This includes information on which drugs are subject 
to prior authorization, which means that a physician must get the plan’s approval in advance before 
prescribing the drug. The value of this field
